use std::path::Path;

fn find_rust_files(dir: &Path) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for entry in std::fs::read_dir(dir).unwrap() {
        let entry = entry.unwrap();
        let path = entry.path();
        let name = path.to_string_lossy().to_string();
        if name.ends_with(".rs") {
            results.push(name);
        }
    }
    results
}
